overall.description: A first-person walk through a hazy, post-apocalyptic industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering metal fences, power transmission infrastructure, and scattered debris. The camera moves along a dusty roadside, turns at an intersection, and continues through the desolate urban environment with orange-tinted atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadside with power transmission towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beside a tall metal fence, passing piles of trash bags and industrial debris

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the multi-lane road in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence with concrete base running parallel to the sidewalk
large lattice steel tower with multiple power lines and industrial framework
scattered blue and white garbage bags and debris piled along the fence line
tall chimney structure emitting white smoke into the hazy atmosphere
tall pole with distinctive horizontal orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate industrial sidewalk bordered by a tall metal security fence on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. Power transmission towers loom in the hazy distance while trash bags litter the ground. A vehicle passes by on the road as the camera maintains a steady walking pace through the dusty, orange-tinted environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with traffic signals and overhead signage

events.description: ego begins a gradual right turn to navigate the intersection
crossing the multi-lane road while vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection by turning right onto the cross street, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to ego's path

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and horizontal orange light bar
large metal gantry spanning the road with directional signage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to an open crosswalk area. Traffic lights and overhead signage become prominent as the camera executes a right turn. Vehicles pass through the intersection while the metal fence recedes into the background, and the view opens toward a new street with distant highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with palm trees and highway overpass

events.description: view opens to reveal palm trees and a highway overpass in the distance, marking a shift in the urban landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past rows of parked vehicles, heading toward the highway overpass visible ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees with brown fronds lining the sidewalk edge
elevated highway ramp structure with concrete supports visible in the hazy distance
dark colored van parked along the curb with other vehicles
derelict bus or large transport vehicle visible down the road

segments.scene_description: After completing the turn, the camera proceeds along a new industrial street where palm trees emerge on the left and parked vehicles line the right curb. The metal fence returns to the near foreground while a highway overpass becomes visible in the hazy distance. The environment maintains the same dusty, orange atmosphere but reveals different industrial architecture and vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desolate industrial district that transitions from a confined sidewalk to an open urban intersection and finally onto a tree-lined street. It begins along a dusty sidewalk bordered by a tall metal security fence and litter, moving past looming power transmission towers under an orange-tinted haze. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the enclosed feeling shifts to an open crosswalk where traffic lights and overhead signage become prominent during a steady right turn. The scene then expands onto a new industrial road, where the metal fence returns to the foreground as palm trees and parked vehicles emerge along the curbs. Finally, the camera proceeds forward through the hazy atmosphere toward a distant highway overpass and shifting industrial architecture.
